damage increased by 5% and casting them has a 30% chance to strike an affected target with an exploding Shooting Star that also deals 52 Astral damage to all nearby enemies.</div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="builds-tier-set-section__most-popular-slots"><div class="hide-on-compact"><div class="enhanced-markdown body body--style-v3-compact"><h3 heading--level-2 heading--style-v3-compact"><span class="do-not-change-color-on-hover Druid">Balance Druid</span> Gear Overview</h2></div><p class="hide-on-compact">The most popular <span class="do-not-change-color-on-hover Druid">Balance Druid</span> gear based on all data across the last 2 weeks. This represents a strong set of gear for this point in Season 1 that is close to Best in Slot but with some alternatives that are easier to obtain. Tier pieces up to the maximum set bonus and legendary items have been prioritized once seen at least once.</p><p class="hide-on-compact"><span class="badge-label badge-label--level-1">BiS</span> Best in Slot data provided by <a href="https://www.wowhead.com/guide/classes/druid/balance/bis-gear" target="_blank"><img class="wowhead-logo-icon" src="https://assets.rpglogs.com/img/wowhead-logo-thumbnail.png" alt="" width="20" height="20" loading="lazy"/> Wowhead&#x27;s Balance Druid Best in Slot Guide.
